default.$description: Default border width for standard field outlines and general border treatments.

action.$description: Default border width for outlined actions such as secondary buttons and icon buttons.

divider.$description: Default border width for separators, section rules, and other divider treatments.

container.$description: Default border width for persistent framed surfaces and layout chrome.

panel.$description: Default border width for raised or transient panels such as menus, drawers, and overlays.

emphasis.$description: Stronger border width reserved for emphasized frames and keylines.

width.$description: Width of the visible focus ring used for keyboard focus states.

offset.$description: Space between a focused element and its focus ring.

interactive.$description: Default corner radius for standard interactive controls.

container.$description: Default corner radius for standard containers such as cards and framed panels.

sm.$description: Small control height for compact buttons, inputs, and select-like controls.

md.$description: Medium control height for default buttons, inputs, and select-like controls.

lg.$description: Large control height for prominent buttons, inputs, and select-like controls.

xl.$description: Extra large control height for spacious buttons, inputs, and select-like controls.

sm.$description: Small maximum width for constrained content regions.

md.$description: Medium maximum width for constrained content regions.

lg.$description: Large maximum width for constrained content regions.

xl.$description: Extra large maximum width for constrained content regions.

weight.$description: Font weight for the display typography role.

size.$description: Font size for the display typography role.

tracking.$description: Letter spacing for the display typography role.

height.$description: Line height for the display typography role.

weight.$description: Font weight for the heading typography role.

size.$description: Font size for the heading typography role.

tracking.$description: Letter spacing for the heading typography role.

height.$description: Line height for the heading typography role.

weight.$description: Font weight for the title typography role.

size.$description: Font size for the title typography role.

tracking.$description: Letter spacing for the title typography role.

height.$description: Line height for the title typography role.

weight.$description: Font weight for the subtitle typography role.

size.$description: Font size for the subtitle typography role.

tracking.$description: Letter spacing for the subtitle typography role.

height.$description: Line height for the subtitle typography role.

weight.$description: Font weight for the eyebrow typography role.

size.$description: Font size for the eyebrow typography role.

tracking.$description: Letter spacing for the eyebrow typography role.

height.$description: Line height for the eyebrow typography role.

weight.$description: Font weight for the large body typography role.

size.$description: Font size for the large body typography role.

tracking.$description: Letter spacing for the large body typography role.

height.$description: Line height for the large body typography role.

weight.$description: Font weight for the body typography role.

size.$description: Font size for the body typography role.

tracking.$description: Letter spacing for the body typography role.

height.$description: Line height for the body typography role.

weight.$description: Font weight for the small body typography role.

size.$description: Font size for the small body typography role.

tracking.$description: Letter spacing for the small body typography role.

height.$description: Line height for the small body typography role.

weight.$description: Font weight for the label typography role.

size.$description: Font size for the label typography role.

tracking.$description: Letter spacing for the label typography role.

height.$description: Line height for the label typography role.

weight.$description: Font weight for the caption typography role.

size.$description: Font size for the caption typography role.

tracking.$description: Letter spacing for the caption typography role.

height.$description: Line height for the caption typography role.

xsmall.$description: Extra small font size of 12px for captions and fine print.

small.$description: Small font size of 14px for labels and secondary text.

p.$description: Paragraph baseline font size of 16px (body text).

tighter.$description: Tighter letter spacing for large display text.

tight.$description: Tight letter spacing for headings and titles.

normal.$description: Default letter spacing for body text and controls.

wide.$description: Wide letter spacing for compact uppercase text.

widest.$description: Widest letter spacing for eyebrow and metadata text.

display.$description: Compact line-height ratio for display typography.

tight.$description: Tight line-height ratio for headings, labels, and controls.

normal.$description: Default line-height ratio for readable body text.

relaxed.$description: Relaxed line-height ratio for long-form text.

sticky.$description: Stacking index for sticky interface regions.

fixed.$description: Stacking index for fixed interface regions.

modal-backdrop.$description: Stacking index for modal backdrop layers.

modal.$description: Stacking index for modal dialog layers.

disabled.$description: Opacity applied to disabled content and controls.

overlay.$description: Opacity used for modal and page overlays.

placeholder.$description: Opacity used for placeholder text and inactive hints.

xs.$description: Extra small gap between related layout items.

sm.$description: Small gap between related layout items.

md.$description: Medium gap between related layout items.

lg.$description: Large gap between related layout items.

xl.$description: Extra large gap between related layout items.

xs.$description: Extra small inset padding inside components and containers.

sm.$description: Small inset padding inside components and containers.

md.$description: Medium inset padding inside components and containers.

lg.$description: Large inset padding inside components and containers.

xl.$description: Extra large inset padding inside components and containers.

section.$description: Default vertical spacing between major page sections.

page.$description: Default outer page padding for broad layouts.

default.$description: Default easing curve for standard UI transitions.

in.$description: Easing curve for elements entering from rest.

out.$description: Easing curve for elements exiting to rest.

in-out.$description: Easing curve for transitions with both acceleration and deceleration.
